Format submissions

Source: R/gen_paper.R
gen_paper.Rd

Format submissions to various academic conferences and journals.

gen_paper(
  ...,
  engine = "xelatex",
  journal = "aom",
  keep_tex = TRUE,
  citation_package = "natbib",
  md_extensions = c("-autolink_bare_uris")
)

Arguments

...

Arguments passed to pdf_document().
engine

character. Latex engine to be used to produce the pdf.
journal

character. Journal to which the paper is submitted. See details for the available options.
keep_tex

Keep the intermediate tex file used in the conversion to PDF
citation_package

The LaTeX package to process citations, natbib or biblatex. Use default if neither package is to be used, which means citations will be processed via the command pandoc-citeproc.
md_extensions

Markdown extensions to be added or removed from the default definition or R Markdown. See the rmarkdown_format for additional details.

Value

R Markdown output format to pass to render

Details

The templates currently available are:

  • aos for Accounting, Organizations, and Society

  • bria for Behavioral Research in Accounting

  • car for Contemporary Accounting Research

  • cpa for Critical Perspectives on Accounting

  • ear for European Accounting Review

  • jae for Journal of Accounting and Economics

  • jar for Journal of Accounting Research

  • jaaf for Journal of Accounting, Auditing, and Finance

  • jmar for Journal of Management Accounting Research

  • mar for Management Accounting Research

  • tar for The Accounting Review

  • jfe for Journal of Financial Economics

  • amj for Academy of Management Journal

  • amr for Academy of Management Review

  • jibs for Journal of International Business Studies

  • jom for Journal of Management

  • mnsc for Management Science

  • orsc for Organization Science

  • smj for Strategic Management Journal

  • orm for Organizational Research Methods

  • jap for Journal of Applied Psychology

Author

Nicolas Mangin
